channel.title: Cover on Weiguang Liu
channel.description: Recent content in Cover on Weiguang Liu

item.title: History
item.description: Contemporary History 2020 May 18 《中共中央国务院关于新时代加快完善社会主义市场经济体制的意见》全文链接 May 25 George Floyd, a 46-year-old black man, died in Minneapolis, Minnesota, after Derek Chauvin, a white police officer, knelt on Floyd’s neck for almost nine minutes while Floyd was handcuffed face down in the street. Protests all over US and around the world. May 28 民法典颁布。2021年1月1日施行。 Jun 8 A lot of companies have laid off people because of the Coronavirus pandemic. The US has seen the worst unemployment rate.

item.title: 五月15
E300 Econometric Methods
item.description: E300 Econometric Methods Zoom Revision Class Date and Time: April 22, 9-11 am BST Venue: Zoom Material: Chapter 36 “Large sample estimation and hypothesis testing” in the Handbook of Econometrics by Newey and McFadden(1994). Office Hours Thursdays, 17.00 - 18.00, starting this week, at the following locations: Oct. 17 - Supervision Room 1 Oct. 24 - Supervision Room 1 Oct. 31 - Supervision Room 1 Nov.

item.title: F400 Asset Pricing
item.description: F400 Asset Pricing Office Hours Wednesday 5-6 pm 13th Feb, Supervision room 1; 20th Feb, Meade room; 27th Feb, Supervision room 2; 6th March, Supervision room 2; 13th March, Marshall room; 20th March, Supervision Room 1. Supplementary Materials Details on Computing the Certainty Equivalence in Chapter 2 Details on Black-Scholes Derivation Details on Finding the Term Structure Equation Solution to Vasicek Model

item.title: Paper 6 Banking and Finance
item.description: Paper 6 Banking and Finance About different channels Link to Bernanke speech Financial accelerator: changes in financial and credit conditions are important in the propagation of the business cycle, a mechanism that has been dubbed the “financial accelerator.” Credit channel: changes in financial conditions may amplify the effects of monetary policy on the economy, the so-called credit channel of monetarypolicy transmission. Credit channel works through (wiki link) Balance sheet channel Bank lending channel Models CSV model CE model Both models can show the financial acceleartor and the credit channel: roughly speaking, the models predict/explain that when a shock happens, it will be amplified through the banking system because banks will change credit rationing behaviour.

item.title: Readings
item.description: Notes on Math and Stats The Main One Linear Algebra and Matrix Analysis Vector Spaces, inner product and Spectral Theorems. Isometry and PSD, Polar and Singular Value Decomposition Jordan Basis Normal Real linear operator Hermitian Matrices Matrix Norm Perturbation Random Matrix Analysis Handwriting Mathematical Analysis Overview and notes on Lebesgue Measurability and Convergence Modes Probability Conditioning and Product Measure Probability and Martingale Empirical Process Empirical Process Notes Chapter 37 of Handbook van der Vaart and Wellner Math Stats Statistics Notes Machine Learning NBER lecture seems useful.
